records.ety: [L. ecloga, Gr. <?/ a selection, choice extracts, fr. <?/ to pick out, choose out; 'ek out + <?/ to gather, choose: cf. F. gloque, cloque. See Ex-, and Legend.]

defs: A pastoral poem, in which shepherds are introduced conversing with each other; a bucolic; an idyl; as, the Ecloques of Virgil, from which the modern usage of the word has been established.
